summary: Iteration 25: Tested GDPR/RODO compliance features. All 8 features working correctly. 1) /privacy page loads with 'Polityka prywatności' heading and 10 sections. 2) /cookies page loads with 'Polityka cookies' heading and 7 sections. 3) Cookie consent banner appears on first visit with 1.5s delay animation. 4) Cookie consent has 'Akceptuję wszystkie' (data-testid='cookie-accept-all') and 'Tylko niezbędne' (data-testid='cookie-accept-necessary') buttons. 5) RODO notice under contact form on /sauny page (data-testid='rodo-notice'). 6) Footer has 'Ustawienia cookies' button (data-testid='cookie-settings-btn') that clears localStorage consent and reloads page to show banner again. 7) /sauny page loads correctly. 8) /balie page loads correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: GDPR/RODO compliance features fully working. Cookie consent stored in localStorage key 'wm_cookie_consent' with format {necessary:true,analytics:boolean,timestamp:string}. Cookie banner has 1.5s delay before appearing (AnimatePresence animation). Privacy page at /privacy has 10 sections. Cookie policy at /cookies has 7 sections. RODO notice is below contact form submit button on /sauny page. Footer 'Ustawienia cookies' button clears localStorage and reloads page to show banner again. All data-testids are correctly implemented: cookie-consent-banner, cookie-accept-all, cookie-accept-necessary, rodo-notice, cookie-settings-btn, privacy-heading, cookies-heading.

privacy_page.details: /privacy page loads with 'Polityka prywatności' heading (data-testid='privacy-heading') and 10 sections covering: Administrator danych, Jakie dane zbieramy, Cel przetwarzania, Podstawa prawna, Okres przechowywania, Odbiorcy danych, Przekazywanie poza EOG, Twoje prawa, Dobrowolność podania danych, Bezpieczeństwo danych

cookies_page.details: /cookies page loads with 'Polityka cookies' heading (data-testid='cookies-heading') and 7 sections covering: Czym są pliki cookies, Rodzaje plików cookies, Google Analytics, Zarządzanie plikami cookies, Wpływ ograniczenia cookies, Zmiany polityki cookies, Kontakt

cookie_consent_banner.details: Cookie consent banner (data-testid='cookie-consent-banner') appears on first visit after 1.5s delay with smooth animation

cookie_accept_all_button.details: 'Akceptuję wszystkie' button (data-testid='cookie-accept-all') saves consent with analytics:true and reloads page

cookie_accept_necessary_button.details: 'Tylko niezbędne' button (data-testid='cookie-accept-necessary') saves consent with analytics:false and hides banner

rodo_notice.details: RODO notice (data-testid='rodo-notice') appears below contact form submit button on /sauny page with text about data administrator and link to Privacy Policy

footer_cookie_settings_button.details: 'Ustawienia cookies' button (data-testid='cookie-settings-btn') in footer clears localStorage consent and reloads page to show cookie banner again

sauny_page.details: /sauny page loads correctly with Hero section, CTA buttons, contact section, and footer

balie_page.details: /balie page loads correctly with WM-Balia branding and all sections
